M

Margaret T. · 3 min ago

"Just started my 14-year-old beagle on glucosamine. Any tips for the first week?"

Joint Care Room

S

Dr. Sarah K. · 2 min ago

"Great question Margaret! Start with a low dose and monitor for digestive upset. Most dogs adjust within a few days."

Joint Care Room

Tom H. · 1 min ago

"Has anyone tried laser therapy for arthritis? Wondering if it is worth the cost."

Wellness Checks

Common Senior Dog Conditions

Symptoms, vet advice, and what to do next.

Arthritis

Key signs: Stiffness, limping, reluctance to climb stairs

Schedule visit 1-2 weeks

Cognitive Dysfunction

Key signs: Confusion, night waking, house soiling

Schedule visit 1-2 weeks

Heart Disease

Key signs: Coughing, breathing difficulty, fainting

Urgent: see vet in 48h

Kidney Disease

Key signs: Increased thirst, weight loss, vomiting

Schedule visit within 1 week

Diabetes

Key signs: Excessive thirst, weight loss, lethargy

Urgent: see vet within 48h

Cancer

Key signs: Lumps, unexplained weight loss, non-healing wounds

Schedule visit 1-2 weeks

Dental Disease

Key signs: Bad breath, drooling, difficulty eating

Schedule visit 2-4 weeks

Vision Loss

Key signs: Bumping into objects, hesitating at edges

Schedule routine checkup

Hearing Loss

Key signs: Not responding to commands, startling easily

Schedule routine checkup

Obesity

Key signs: Excess weight, difficulty moving, fatigue

Schedule visit 1-2 weeks
